title: Best Paper Award @ ICRA-26 Workshop on Manipulation Robustness
description: Huge congratulations to Yuhe Gong for the amazing work! Our paper 'HANDLE: Robust Non-prehensile Liquid Manipulation in Cluttered, Human-centric Environments with Physical HRI' received the Best Paper Award at the 2026 ICRA Workshop on Manipulation Robustness: Towards Human-Level Robustness under Real-World Challenges. Kudos to all co-authors: Junhui Huang, Riddhiman Laha, Zewen Yang, Hao Xing, Ayse Kucukyilmaz, Seth Hutchinson, and Luis Figueredo.

title: Our group visit @ IEEE ICRA 2026 in Vienna
description: Great to be back at another IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) in Vienna! It was fantastic seeing old friends and colleagues, and meeting amazing new people in robotics. A highlight to Yuhe Gong, who attended as Co-Chair of the IEEE RAS Student Activities Committee and won the Best Paper Award at the Workshop on Manipulation Robustness together with Riddhi! Now, looking forward to IROS.

title: New paper just out of the print! CHAI: Compliant Human-centered Adapt. Interact. through Diffusion-based Lang. Traj. Transf. @ IEEE RAL
description: Congratulations to Junhui Huang for the amazing work. CHAI is a novel language-driven diffusion-based framework for real-time modulation of robot's kinematics and mechanical compliance --- allowing impedance and trajectory modulation during pHRI. The work extends our previosus LATTE paper (with Arthur Bucker), now including diffusion policies and compliant safe interaction. Check it out at the link below.

title: 2nd Workshop on Geometric-Aware Representations accepted @ IROS 2026
description: Excited to announce that our workshop '2nd Workshop on Geometric-Aware Representations: Structured priors, metrics, constraints, and groundings for Manipulation' has been accepted for the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026) in Pittsburgh! Following our successful first edition at ICRA 2023, this edition focuses on the role of geometric structure across the full manipulation stack: sensing, learning, planning, and control.

title: New paper just out of the print! G-MAPP @ IEEE RAL
description: Congratulations to Tanmay Bishnoi for the amazing work, and the collaboration with Riddhiman Laha, Tobias Löw, and Jose Alex Chandy! G-MAPP introduces a GPU-accelerated multi-agent planning and perception framework that enables real-time reactive motion generation in unstructured dynamic environments by tightly coupling perception and planning.

title: RAICAM Lessons Learned - New paper just accepted at Robotics and Autonomous Systems (RAS)
description: Huge congratulations to the whole RAICAM team, and particularly to Alperen Kenan! The paper 'Lessons learned from the RAICAM doctoral network research sprints and field demonstrations' has been accepted in the Robotics and Autonomous Systems (RAS) journal, highlighting field demonstrations and key outcomes from the RAICAM Project.

title: Invited Editor @ IEEE CBS 2026
description: Happy to join the editorial team for the IEEE IEEE International Conference on Cyborg and Bionic Systems (CBS 2026), to be held in Munich. Looking forward for this top-tier event in Munich and connecting to old and new friends! Submission website is open. Don't miss it!

title: Riddhiman Laha – PhD Defended!
description: Massive congratulations to Dr Riddhiman Laha, who has successfully defended his PhD viva! Riddhi's thesis pushed the boundaries of reactive manipulation and multi-agent robot planning. He is now joining Seth Hutchinson's group as a Postdoctoral Researcher — an outstanding step for an outstanding researcher!

title: IEEE RAS SPARX Mentor (2026-2027)
description: Honoured to be selected as a Mentor for the IEEE RAS SPARX Programme supporting early-career researchers in robotics and AI. And, even more happier for the opportunity to work with Dr Hugo T. Kussaba, one of the brilliant minds in geometrics methods straight from Brazil.

title: Editors' Choice Certificate: Elsevier Best Paper Award
description: Honoured to receive the Best Paper Award (Editors' Choice Certificate) from Elsevier for our work: 'Motion planning for robotics: A review for sampling-based planners.' The award recognises the paper's impact as a reference for researchers globally. Kudos to the whole team, particularly Liding Zhang and Kuanqi Cai for their amazing work.

title: GerMinas Invitation: Supporting Research in Brazil
description: So happy to support the research community in my home country, Brazil! 🇧🇷 🤖 Thrilled to be invited to GerMinas to share our work on robotics and foster new collaborations with brilliant minds back home. Looking forward to my talk and connecting!

title: Yuhe Gong – Conference Events Co-Chair for the IEEE RAS Student Activities Committee
description: Delighted to share that my Yuhe Gong has been appointed Conference Co-Chair for IEEE SAC. A fantastic milestone that reflects her growing leadership in the robotics community!

title: Triple Paper Acceptance @ IEEE ICRA-26
description: Excited to announce 3 papers accepted for ICRA-2026! We will present: (i) GIFT: Category-level object manipulation; (ii) GeoFIK: Fast geometric IK for the Franka arm; and (iii) Contact-Safe RL with ProMP reparameterization. See you in Vienna! Kudos to all authors, especially, Bingkun, Pablo, Yuhe, and Cristiana.

title: Best Paper Award – Yuhe @ Safety Robotics Workshop
description: Super Kudos to Yuhe Gong on winning the Best Paper Award at the workshop on Building Safety-Critical Robots! A fantastic recognition of her work in safe robot motion planning.

title: Organized 2 Workshops & Invited Talk @ IROS 2025
description: We have two two exciting workshops, and I am looking forward to see you there! 'Building Safe Robots' and 'Multi-Arm Manipulation' with amazing researchers and friends. Special thanks to Robin J. Kirschner, Kuanqi Cai, and the NOKOV Motion Capture team for their support!

title: Area Chair - Systems Track @ HRI 2026
description: Thrilled to serve as Area Chair at the Systems track at ACM/IEEE Intern. Conf. on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI-26). Amazing opportunity and privilege to contribute to shaping its scientific programme. Special thanks to Emmanuel Senft for organizing and supporting the editorial team.

title: 4th Geriatronics Summit & Summer School
description: Super happy to have organized the 4th Geriatronics Summit and first Geriatronics Summer Schoool in Garmisch-Partenkirchen. It was a challenging and privilige to build up and chair this programme. 60 Participants explored human-robot collaboration for ageing societies, building practical skills. Thanks for all the 11 speakers for their talks, the Caritas Team for the hands-on tutorials on assistive robotics, and colleagues for supporting the discussions.

title: Live Demos of Assistive Robots @ Automatica 2025
description: Aamazing time at Automatica 2025. Together with the team of the Geriatronics Project X, and my students from UoN, I am happy to have coordinated 7 demos with personally 3 demos running in parallel, swowcasing some amazing research and putting them to real-world testing and evaluation. Amazing kudos to the whole team!

title: Winner of the PhyRC Challenge @ ICRA-25
description: Super excited to announce that we have won the Bed Bath Tracking Challenge at the Physical Human-Robot Interaction Competition (PhyRC) during ICRA 2025, organized by Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee and his team. Kudos to the whole team, Yuhe, Jialin, Simon, Liz, Praminda, and Aly. But, especially, Koyo who lead the efforts.

title: Invited Talk @ ICRA 2025: Long-term Human Motion Prediction
description: Very happy to give a talk at the 7th Workshop on Long-term Human Motion Prediction at ICRA 2025. Many thanks for the organizers for putting up some exciting programme!

title: Participation @ ICRA 2025 in Atlanta
description: Amazing time in Atlanta for ICRA 2025! This was the first time I managed to integrate former studens from TUM with my current team at TUM and Notts. Couldn't be prouder or happier for all the achievements of the amazing reserachers I was happy and priviliged to work with!

title: Feature @ TC on Robot Control Spotlight
description: Extremely honoured to been featured in the very first spotlight issue from the IEEE RAS TC on Robot Control sessions: " TC on Robot Control Spotlight", which highlights researchers who are pushing the boundaries of robot control. Fully honoured to share insights about my research on building intelligent and safe robots.

title: Fresh TRO Paper: Safe Robot Reflexes
description: Excited to announce our new IEEE-TRO Paper on Robot Safety: Safe Robot Reflexes: A Taxonomy-based Decision and Modulation Framework. Reflexes and post-collision reactions are fundamental for safety, and this work comprehensively covers these aspects with the best robot safety team I could ask for!

title: Grant: Transforming Chemistry Labs
description: Super excited with our project Transforming Chemistry Labs: Safe & Intuitive Human-in-the-Loop Robotic Systems, supprted by a URKI grant from the AI-Chemy Hub.

title: Invited Talk @ Talking Robotics
description: Amazing opportunity and privilige to give a talk at the Talking Robots! This is an amazing initative, which started with my former student Riddhiman Laha and colleagues, and it has been followed up with Yuhe Gong. It is 100% worth checking out the amazing talks there.

title: Invited Talk @ AIchemy Inaugural Annual Conference
description: Invited talk at the AIchemy Inaugural Annual Conference. Excited to share our work on chemistry automation, and our project on Transforming Chemistry Labs: Safe & Intuitive Human-in-the-Loop Robotic Systems.

title: Elevated to IEEE Senior Member
description: Deeply honored to be elevated to the grade of IEEE Senior Member!

title: Fresh Papers @ IEEE ICRA-25
description: Happy to say we have 2 fresh papers accepted at ICRA-25! (i) manipulability transfer and tracking control: bridging domain adaptation with predictive feasibility and (ii) on the synthesis of reactive collision-free whole-body robot motions: a complementarity-based approaching. Kudos specially to Haowen Yao and Yuhe Gong, particulary Yuhe on her first (of many) ICRA/IROS Paper!

title: Invited Talk @ 6th UK Robot Manipulation Workshop
description: Very excited to be back to a UK Robot Manipulation Workshop and being able to give a Keynote Talk at Kings. It is exciting to meet old and new friends and discuss research in one of the best events about manipulation in the world! Extremely proud that all my students presented and received valuable feedback, including Yuhe, Raul, Jose, and Koyo!

title: Steering Group for Chemical Materials Design
description: Thrilled to join the Steering Group for Chemical Materials Design at the Henry Royce Institute. Excited to support groundbreaking discoveries.

title: IEEE UK & Ireland RAS Chapter - Secretary
description: I'm truly honoured to have been elected as the Secretary of the IEEE Robotics and Automation Society - UK/Ireland (RAS) Chapter for the 2025-2026 term.

title: Fresh ICRA-25 Workshops
description: Holiday Season Presents: 2 amazing WS accepted @ ICRA-25! 🤖 WS.1: How do Robots Care? Innovative Strategies and Interfaces for Physically Assistive Robots in Healthcare; 🤖 WS.2: The Future of Intelligent Manufacturing: From innovation to implementation.

title: Invited Talk @ Plenary Talk @ SBGTEC-24 - 5th BR Conf. Gerontech
description: Just had an incredible and personal experience giving the keynote at the 5th Brazilian Conference on Gerontechnology in Curitiba! 🇧🇷🤖 Special thanks for the organizers Taiuani, Carla, Lilian and Fausto.

title: Invited Talk @ BioRob-2024 MathWorks Special Session
description: Following up our amazing collaboration, I was very happy to give an invited talk at the MathWorks Special Session at BioRob 2024 about our MathWorks Toolbox RHuMAN vs 2.0 currently underdevelop with the brilliant Junnan Li and Haowen Yao. Many thanks for Kathi Kugler for our ongoing collaboration.

title: WS @ BioRob-2024 on Revolutionising Ageing
description: We just completed the Workshop on Revolutionising Ageing at the well-organised BioRob-2024 in Heidelberg. Thank to the amazing speakers: Robert Riener, Mohamed Bouri, Eva Swinnen, Fanny Ficuciello, Tadej Petric and Yanan Li.

title: Invited Talk @ RSS-24 - WS on Assistive Manip.
description: Had a wonderful time giving a talk at the Learning for Assistive Manipulation WS at RSS-2024! Many thanks for the amazing WS. Kudos to the organizers Fan Zhang, Jihong Zhu, PhD, Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee, Zackory Erickson, Jens Kober and Maya Cakmak!

title: 3rd Geriatronics Summit
description: Thrilled to announce that the 3rd Geriatronics Summit was a success!! A beautiful place with enlightening conversations about the future of Geriatronics. Many thanks to Speakers: Eckehard Steinbach, Aaron Edsinger, Astrid Weiss, Dana Kulic, Robert Riener, Christian Ott, Seth Hutchinson, Georgia Chalvatzaki, Uli Fischer, Yanan Li, Meghan Huber, Mohamed Bouri, Katrin Paldan.

title: Invited Talk @ Julie Shah's Lab at MIT
description: Visited Julie Shah's Iterative Lab at MIT. It was great to see their brilliant work, give a talk, and discuss research with Mike, Dimos, and others. Thanks for the warm reception!

title: Mathworks Research Summit
description: Honored to be invited to the 2024 Mathworks Research Summit. Looking forward to engaging discussions with contributors and exploring innovations in Matlab.

title: ICRA New Generation Star
description: Honored to be selected for the ICRA New Generation Star Project, sponsored by NOKOV. Check out the Star Talk on YouTube.

title: Invited Talk @ Leeds: Good to be back!
description: Looking forward to giving a talk at the Robotics@Leeds Seminar on May 24th. Excited to reconnect post-pandemic and see the latest developments!

title: Visit to IIT for RAICAM Event
description: Excited to visit Arash Ajoudani's team at IIT as part of the RAICAM event with our amazing consortium.

title: Invited Talk @ Bavarian International School
description: Delighted to speak at the Bavarian International School. Always a pleasure discussing robotics with the next generation!

title: Fresh RAL Paper: Fingertip Manipulability Paper Published
description: Excited about our IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters paper on Fingertip Manipulability Assessment. Congratulations to Amartya and Junnan!

title: Papers Accepted at ICRA-24
description: Thrilled to have three papers accepted at ICRA-24: RETOM, Barrier-Certified Systems, and CITR for Robotic Manipulation.

title: ICRA Workshop on Assistive Systems
description: Our Workshop 'Assistive Systems: Lab to Patient Care' has been accepted for ICRA-2024. Excited for the event!

title: Open Position Announcement
description: Excited to announce a fully funded scholarship position in my group at the University of Nottingham.

title: Profile Feature @ Tagesspiegel Background
description: Honoured to be featured in Tagesspiegel Background Digitalisierung & KI! The profile covers the trajectory of my research, from fundamental robotics algorithms to real-world deployment in healthcare and AI. A great spotlight on our vision for the future of intelligent robots.

title: Fresh TRO Paper: Predictive Multi-Agent React. Planning
description: Our TRO paper 'Predictive Multi-Agent Planning and Landing Controller for Reactive Dual-Arm Manipulation' has been published. Congratulations to Riddhi and Marvin!

title: Fresh RAL Paper: Enhanced Dexterity Maps
description: Proud to share our paper 'Enhanced Dexterity Maps (EDM): A New Map for Manipulator Capability Analysis'. Congratulations to Haowen!

title: IROS-23 Workshop on Geriatronics
description: Output of the workshop 'Geriatronics: AI and Robotics for Health & Well-Being in Older Age' at IROS-23.

title: IROS-23 Papers and Invited Talks
description: Great time at IROS-23 in Detroit. Some fun with Rafael and our paper on Shared Autonomy Control for Slosh-Free Teleoperation. Also, many thanks to Luka, Wansoo, Heni, Arash and Eiichi for inviting me to a talk at the 6th Ergonomic Physical Human-Robot Collaboration: Harnessing Advancements in Robot Learning.

title: Invited Talk @ IROS 2023 - HARCO Workshop
description: Invited talk at the IROS 2023 Human-Aware Robotic Co-workers (HARCO) Workshop.

title: HFR-23 - Human-Friendly Robotics Workshop
description: Great experience hosting and organizing the 16th International Workshop on Human-Friendly Robotics at Munich, Germany with great people and friends, Cristina, Patricia, Manuel and Hinrich. Great papers and talks, including from my students and collaborators, Ainoor, Junnan, Amartya and Mazin.

title: Lecturer Position at Nottingham
description: Started a lecturership position at the University of Nottingham, UK. Looking forward to new challenges and building a great lab.

title: 2nd Geriatronics Summit
description: Amazing experience to host the 2nd Geriatronics Summit! Many thanks to all the amazing 16 speakers.

title: Geriatronics Summit Awards
description: Congrats to my student Rafael I. Cabral Muchacho for getting the best student paper award at the Geriatronics Summit! And congrats to my collaborator Eva Theresa Jahn and Yuhe Gong, my student to be, for the tied 3rd place!

title: [In the Media]: Spillnot in Automatica - It won't fail!
description: Exciting times at Automatica Munich 2023. In addition to supporting several demos of the Geriatronics team, my research group w/ Rafael I. Cabral Muchacho and Riddhiman Laha had a super fun demo: Interacting with Spill-Free Robots, where we challenged people to break our demo (Result: 8-hours of continuous run per 4 days, hundreds to thousands of users from kids to roboticists — and no break!)

title: WS on Geometric Representations!
description: Excited about output of our workshop on Geometric Representations: The Roles of Screw Theory, Lie Algebra & Geometric Algebra. At the peak, we had more than 110 people attending! Congrats to Julen U., Niklas Wilhelm Funk, Jan Peters, Georgia Chalvatzaki for the best paper!

title: ICRA-23 London Time!
description: Excited to present two papers with our team! Congrats to Arthur Bucker, Wenxi Wu and Riddhiman Laha! Talk to us at the poster session! Also, excited to have once again a demo running in the Exhibition center. Check out the Franka/Clearpath booth.

title: Invited Talk @ Gabriella Pizzuto's visit and talk
description: Very happy to host a good friend and amazing researcher Gabriella Pizzuto for a talk about robotics and chemistry!

title: Invited Talk @ Devanthro - RoBody!
description: Super happy to give at Devanthro - the Robody Company, see friends and check out their super cool Roboy and the student's presentations.

title: Fresh IROS WS - Geriatronics!
description: Our Workshop Geriatronics: AI and Robotics for Health & Well-Being in Older Age has been accepted for the 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023).

title: Associated Editor for IROS!
description: I have been invited to work as Associated Editor at the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)! Excited to contribute with the excellence of the conference!

title: RAICAM Kick-Off Meeting!
description: I was very happy to host RAICAM's Kick-off meeting with amazing collaborators.

title: [In the Media]: Spillnot is everywhere!
description: Our research was covered at the TUM.de website. We were also seen at the U-Bahn (metro) all over Munich. Many thanks to Andreas Schmitz.

title: Fresh Papers for ICRA-23
description: Our Papers (i) S*: On Safe and Time Efficient Robot Motion Planning and (ii) LaTTe: Language Trajectory TransformEr (arxiv version) have been accepted for presentation at ICRA-23!

title: [Award]: Paper Award Finalist at IEEE-RAS Humanoids-22
description: We were awarded the Best Interactive Paper Award Finalist at the IEEE-RAS Humanoids-22. Paper: Integrated Bi-Manual Motion Generation & Control shaped for Probabilistic Movement Primitives! Kudos to Jonathan, Riddhi, João and Doro!

title: [Award]: VDE Best Bachelor Thesis to Ben!
description: Benjamin Bogenberger, who recently finished his Bachelor thesis advised by me and Riddhiman Laha, has received the VDE Bayer Award: Best Bachelor Thesis. Kudos to Ben!

title: [In the Media] Collab. with Microsoft
description: Our work in collaboration with Microsoft Research has been highlighted in their website!

title: Fresh Papers for IROS-22
description: Very happy to say that we had 4 papers accepted for IROS + 1 RAL for presentation. It is going to be a busy IROS.

title: Demos at Automatica Munich
description: Exciting times at the Automatica Munich. Together with the Geriatronics team and my research group, we presented a total of 5 demos at Automatica-22.

title: 1st Geriatronics Summit!
description: Amazing experience to host the 1st Geriatronics Summit! Many thanks for all the amazing 15 speakers!

title: Geriatronics Summit Awards
description: Congrats to my students and collaborators for awards at the Geriatronics Summit!

title: Award: ICRA-22 Best Reviewer Award
description: Received the ICRA-22 Outstanding Reviewer Award from the Conference Editorial Board (CEB). It is one of the most important I've ever received given the importance I give to the review process!

title: MSCA-DN RAICAM - Accepted
description: Our Marie-Curie Doctoral Network proposal (MSCA-DN/Horizon) has been accepted. The Robotics and Artificial Intelligence for Critical Asset Monitoring (RAICAM) project will start in 2022!
